query: ALTER TABLE station_reviews CHANGE COLUMN `stationId` `station_id` INT NOT NULL, CHANGE COLUMN `userId` `user_id` INT NOT NULL, CHANGE COLUMN `ownerResponse` `owner_response` TEXT, CHANGE COLUMN `ownerResponseAt` `owner_response_at` TIMESTAMP NULL, CHANGE COLUMN `isApproved` `is_approved` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, CHANGE COLUMN `isVisible` `is_visible` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, CHANGE COLUMN `createdAt` `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CHANGE COLUMN `updatedAt` `updated_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
